html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Wallpaper Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Wallpaper Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code

Wood Paneling		 ×1 "Goes up easy." interior_wall_wood

Checkered Wall Paper		 ×6 "For that Diner chic." interior_wall_checkered

Floral Wall Paper		 ×6 "Feel the velvet embossing." interior_wall_floral

Sunflower Wall Paper		 ×6 "The fall harvest look." interior_wall_sunflower

Harlequin Wall Paper		 ×10 "Edgy and elegant." interior_wall_harlequin

Peagawk Wall Paper		 ×6 "Smooth some ruffled feathers." interior_wall_peagawk

Orange Wall Paper		 ×4 "A deep orange." interior_wall_plain_ds

Purple Wall Paper		 ×4 "A deep purple." interior_wall_plain_rog

Rope Wall Panneling		 ×6 "Tie the the room together." interior_wall_rope

Circle Wall Tiling		 ×10 "It's circles on wall paper." interior_wall_circles

Marble Wall Tiling		 ×15 "A solid way to finish." interior_wall_marble

Fine Wall Tiling		 ×15 "Often chosen by pigs in office." interior_wall_mayorsoffice

Full Wall Moulding		 ×15 "A lot of work, but worth the effort." interior_wall_fullwall_moulding

Upholstered Wall		 ×8 "Like a sofa on your wall." interior_wall_fullwall_upholstered

Bugs

  • Spawning items and structures in this tab using the Console will crash the game.


Gallery

  • Wood Paneling texture.
  • Checkered Wall Paper Texture
  • Floral Wall Paper texture.
  • Sunflower Wall Paper Texture
  • Harlequin Wall Paper Texture
  • Peagawk Wall Paper Texture
  • Orange Wall Paper Texture
  • Purple Wall Paper Texture
  • Rope Wall Panneling texture.
  • Circle Wall Tiling Texture
  • Marble Wall Tiling Texture
  • Fine Wall Tiling Texture
  • Full Wall Moulding Texture
  • Upholstered Wall Texture
  • Floral Wall Paper Texture.
  • Wood Paneling looks similar to Wilson/Wagstaff's house walls.
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Wallpaper Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]
The following items and structures can be acquired in the Wallpaper Tab:
Name
Recipe
Description
Spawn Code
Wood Paneling
×1
"Goes up easy."
interior_wall_wood
“A bunch of wood.”
–Wilson, when examining Wood Paneling
“Dang. Won't burn.”
–Willow, when examining Wood Paneling
“Is wall.”
–Wolfgang, when examining Wood Paneling
“Another wall in my life.”
–Wendy, when examining Wood Paneling
“WALL ACCESSORY ACQUIRED”
–WX-78, when examining Wood Paneling
“The bare basics.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Wood Paneling
“I like this one.”
–Woodie, when examining Wood Paneling
“Some basic walls.”
–Maxwell, when examining Wood Paneling
“Constructive.”
–Wagstaff, when examining Wood Paneling
“Adequate.”
–Wigfrid, when examining Wood Paneling
“It's a wall.”
–Webber, when examining Wood Paneling
“It's a wall. I'll take it.”
–Walani, when examining Wood Paneling
“Quaint walls for a quaint place.”
–Warly, when examining Wood Paneling
“'tis a bulk'ead fer'a house.”
–Woodlegs, when examining Wood Paneling
“'TIS WALL O' CHEAPNESS”
–Wilba, when examining Wood Paneling
“Friends for wall”
–Wormwood, when examining Wood Paneling
“That's the wall.”

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thẻ Hình Nền là một danh mục chế tạo dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Tab Đổi mới.
title: Wallpaper Tab
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Wall Papers.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Wallpaper Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found under the [[Renovate Tab]]. == Craftable Items and Structures == The following items and structures can be acquired in the Wallpaper Tab: {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" |- ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Name ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Recipe ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Description ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Spawn Code |- | [[File:Wood Paneling.png|32px]]
